# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept because the source is a research preprint with explicit benchmark construction details and measured agent performance results.

## Why

The source clearly meets institute admission criteria as a serious preprint reporting real experimental results. It defines a benchmark, describes the evaluation protocol, gives dataset scale and coverage numbers, and reports concrete resolved rates, pass-rate observations, token consumption, and task statistics across multiple model-agent configurations.

## Limits
